---
name: Story
about: A vertically sliced, INVEST-compliant piece of work
---

<!--
  BEFORE YOU SUBMIT — remove this block.

  A good story is:
  • Vertically sliced: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vertical_slice
  • Follows INVEST: https://www.agilealliance.org/glossary/invest/

  Open Questions must all be resolved before dev begins.
-->

## Description
What this is. The "what", not the "why" — one or two sentences.

## Value
What someone gains once this is done. Described from the user's perspective — what can they now do, see, or experience that they couldn't before?

## Background / Context
Why this matters and what prompted it. The problem being solved.

## Dependency
What this is blocked by, or what it blocks. Link related issues.

## Limitations
Explicit scope boundaries — what's out of scope, and why.
Also capture tradeoffs: what we're giving up or risking by taking this approach.

## Open Questions
Unresolved decisions that must be answered before this is ready for development.

## Acceptance Criteria
Specific, verifiable conditions that define done. At least one criterion should directly reflect the Value above — not just technical correctness.

## Test Cases
Scenarios to check once implemented.

## Tech Notes
Implementation approach, technical constraints, or anything a developer needs to know.
